characters.name: Alex
characters.description: AlexGenderMaleFirst mentionedShe'll Still Be Dead at HalftimeEpisode count0Full nameAlexFamily membersChelsea Melini(Ex-Wife)Tom(Ex-Father-In-Law)Martha(Ex-Mother-In-Law)Unnamed parentsSeason(s)S6-S7Alexis the ex-husband ofChelsea. He is mentioned inSeason 6andSeason 7. Alex was married toChelsea Meliniwhen they were young. They remained married for eight years before they divorced. Chelsea remained close friends with his mother even after their marriage broke apart. His mother dies before the events of "She'll Still Be Dead at Halftime" and Chelsea decides to attend her funeral in Santa Barbara. Everyone attending the funeral including Chelsea at his parents' house until it is over. At the funeral however, Alex spoke to Chelsea and things went well until Alex tries to put the moves on her and she decides to leave.

characters.name: Alexis
characters.description: AlexisPortrayed byCarrie ReichenbachFirst seen"Winky-Dink Time"Last seen"Fish in a Drawer"Episode count2Full nameAlexisOriginUSAProfessionProstituteSeason(s)S5Alexisis a prostitute that was set up byCharlieto Alan.  She appeared in the season 5 episode "Winky-Dink Time". When Alan thought that he wanted to go directly to sex, he had the idea to call a prostitute asking help to his brother. But when she came, Alan goofed when she wanted that Alexis were "honest". That is to say, he doesn't wanted that she said: "ah baby, you really turn me on!" very beginning, because in his relationships with other women that did not "happen so fast". So finally, she go away because Alan doesn't believe "that he's the biggest she's ever seen", returned the money to Alan and told him to   not call her ever again.

characters.name: Angie
characters.description: AngieGenderFemalePortrayed bySusan BlakelyFirst seen"If My Hole Could Talk"Last seen"Waiting for the Right Snapper"Episode count2Full nameAngieProfessionAuthorFamily membersJeremy (Son)Season(s)S5Angie(played bySusan Blakely) is an author and Charlie's ex-girlfriend. She was the first older woman Charlie dated since high school. Angie is the author of a popular self-help bookCharliewanted to read. They met in a bookstore whereAlanwas getting a book forJake'sclass project. Charlie begins dating Angie, he learns she joined the Peace Corps after college in 1972, making her in her late 50s. Alan and Charlie are both very fond of Angie, and they mostly fight for her attention. Being confused, Charlie (and Alan separately) contacts therapist Linda Freeman, because being involved with an older woman is quite unfamiliar to him. She comes to the conclusion that due to Evelyn's toxic parenting, Charlie is subconsciously using Angie as a surrogate mother since she is warm, loving and affectionate. Charlie eventually meets Angie’s 32 year old son Jeremy and his fiancée Tricia. Tricia is no stranger as she and Charlie had a former escapade in Las Vegas. She realises she still loves Charlie and tells Angie and Jeremy all about it, breaking of her engagement with Jeremy. The latter is devastated, has a nervous breakdown and tries to drink bleach (off screen). Despite the fact that Charlie reveals he didn’t respond to Tricia’s advances and how he she is responsible, Angie was angry at him and ceased all contact with him and Alan.

characters.name: Archie Baldwin
characters.description: Archie BaldwinPortrayed byJon LovitzFirst seen"The Unfortunate Little Schnauser"Last seen"The Unfortunate Little Schnauser"Episode count1Full nameArchie BaldwinOriginUSAProfessionJingle writerSeason(s)S3Archie Baldwinis the archenemy ofCharlie Harper, because he always wins whenever they are nominated for an advertising award of the Jingles. He is portrayed by Jon Lovitz. He appeared in the episode "The Unfortunate Little Schnauser" telling Charlie that he was nominated for the advertising award. But Charlie doesn't want to go to the award ceremony, because Archie always wins.Alanmanages to convince Charlie to go to the event, but Archie ends up winning. It is implied that he andEvelynhad a "good night".

characters.name: Ashley
characters.description: AshleyGenderFemalePortrayed byEmily OsmentFirst seenBazinga! That's From a TV ShowLast seenBazinga! That's From a TV ShowEpisode count1Full nameAshleyFamily membersTammy(Mother)Unnamed (Father)2 SiblingsJerry(Boyfriend)Jake Harper(ex-boyfriend)Season(s)S10Ashleyis the daughter ofTammy. She was tutored in math byJakewho subsequently broke up with Tammy to be with her. She had a bad break-up before she was comforted by her mother's boyfriendJakewho also tutored her in math. Jake and Ashley had an affair behind Tammy's back. She found out quick enough and was not pleased with the news. In the episodeBazinga! That's From a TV Show, Ashley's former boyfriend,Jerrycomes to win her back, but fails.Waldenand Tammy have a heart-to-heart talk over her parenting and Walden believes Ashley and Jake will be happy together since Jake and Tammy were good together. Tammy returns to give the young couple her blessing. Unfortunately, Jerry comes back to the house later that night and proposes to Ashley, having her accept, with the promise of a Mercedes Benz. Jake is now left alone and Alan comforts him.

characters.name: Ava Pierce
characters.description: Ava PierceGenderFemalePortrayed byTaylan WrightFirst seenThe Duchess of Dull-in-SackLast seenA Big Bag of DogAppeared inThe Duchess of Dull-in-SackGrandma's PieMr. Hose Says "Yes"Why We Gave Up WomenA Big Bag of DogEpisode count5Full nameAvaFamily membersNigel Pierce-Windsor(Father)Zoey Hyde-Tottingham-Pierce(Mother)King Rupert(Stepfather)Edward Hyde-Tottingham(Maternal Grandfather)Sharon Hyde-Tottingham(Maternal Grandmother)Season(s)S9-S10Ava Hyde-Tottingham-PierceisZoey's seven-year-old daughter. She is first mentioned duringWaldenand Zoey's first date, in "A Fishbowl Full of Glass Eyes". Ava is an incredibly cute, sweet, playful, kind, smart, and loving young girl. She makes her first appearance in "The Duchess of Dull-in-Sack", when Zoey urges Walden to leave her house, because she does not want Ava to see him. She is also shown, later on, to be quite self-aware. She knows about the problems between her parents and she also knows she is of royal descent, calling herself "Queen Ava". Ava also has a stuffed animal called "Winston" and she seems to call Walden "Sir Schmidt" or just "Walden". Ava is an incredibly cute, sweet, playful, kind, smart, and loving young girl.
characters.personality_section: Ava is an incredibly cute, sweet, playful, kind, smart, and loving young girl.

characters.description: BetsyisCharlie Harper's ex-girlfriend who appears inSeason 7and "marries" him, though it wasn't legal. BetsyPortrayed byKaty MixonFirst seen"Untainted by Filth"Last seen"Gumby with a Pokey"Episode count3Full nameBetsyProfessionStripperMasseuseFamily membersCharlie Harper(Ex-"husband")Un-named husbandSeason(s)S7 Betsy is a stripper and part-time masseuse who often goes on drunken escapades, hiding her wedding ring inside her diaphragm case, and sometimes ends up marrying strangers despite being already married to another man. She was going through menstruation cycle when she metCharliein "Tinkle Like a Princess"

characters.name: Beverly
characters.description: BeverlyPortrayed byAllison JanneyFirst seen"My Damn Stalker"Last seen"My Damn Stalker"Episode count1Full nameBeverlyOriginUSAFamily members3 Unnamed Ex-Husbands1 sisterSeason(s)S4Beverlyis a woman whoAlan Harpermet on a dating site and also dated. 1 sister She was a woman whom Alan met on a dating network. To impress her, on the network, he said thatCharlie'shouse was his. But after talking on the terrace and realizing that she has some issues of divorce, he confessed to her that the house was Charlie and when he was in middle of a divorce and had nowhere to go, he hosted him. Beverly doesn't get angry because her problems were worse than Alan's and decided to go along with the date. Finally they had sex. But when Charlie went to talk to Alan aboutRosemoving to London and that he erred, he saw that Alan was tied hand and foot on his bed. Alan said that nothing was wrong, that everyone "makes mistakes".

characters.name: Billy Stanhope
characters.description: Billy StanhopeGenderMalePortrayed byPatton OswaltFirst seenThe War Against GingivitisLast seenRun, Steven Staven! Run!Episode count5Full nameWilliam StanhopeSeason(s)S9-S10William "Billy" Stanhope(played byPatton Oswalt) is the former best friend ofWalden Schmidtwho helped him create the website that would becomeBlungogo(Nice to Meet You, Walden Schmidt). After Walden sold the site for 1.8 billion dollars. Billy went crazy, started smoking pot and made a number of hate videos on YouTube directed at his former friend. They later became business partners again after Billy figured out the secret of theElectric Suitcase, a project the men had been working on before their split. Billy is sleeping withBridget Schmidt, a source of tension between the men, Walden and Billy have a love and hate relationship, and even though they don't realize it, they're probably best friends. In season nine, after years of not speaking to one another, Walden and Billy start their business back up again. Walden and Billy sold their company in season ten for 1.2 billion dollars to Mark Zuckerberg. In mid season ten, Bridget breaks up with Billy, resulting in Walden, Alan, Billy, and Herb having a guy's night drinking and complaining about women.

characters.name: Brandon Harris
characters.description: Brandon HarrisPortrayed byElijah Michael LeeFirst seen"Putting Swim Fins on a Cat"Last seen"Putting Swim Fins on a Cat"Episode count1Full nameBrandon HarrisOriginUSAFamily membersLinda Harris(Mother)Gary Harris(Father)Season(s)S5Brandon Harrisis the son of Gary andLinda Harris. He appeared in the season 5 episode,Putting Swim Fins on a Cat. WhenCharliegoes to Linda's house to give her a present and have sex, she said that not now because she had to care for her son. At lunchtime, Charlie said it to Brandon to end the meal so that he and Linda could "be alone". When Brandon said he didn't want it, Charlie made ​​him laugh with a song and finally ate it. Then, from there, Charlie began to spend more time with the child, play with it, touch a song on the piano ... When he finally fell asleep and Linda went to look, she said she could leave him with his father and they could "do it". But Charlie said that he was so tired and to be left for another day. Ironically, Charlie was not doing what he wanted to do from the beginning.

characters.name: Celeste Burnett
characters.description: Celeste BurnettGenderFemalePortrayed byTinashe KachingweFirst seenThe Mooch At The BooLast seenWarning, It's DirtyEpisode count4Full nameCeleste BurnettFamily membersJerome Burnett(Father)Keisha Burnett(Mother)Season(s)S6-S7Celeste Burnettis a minor recurring character from Season 6 and 7 of Two and a Half Men. She was the former girlfriend ofJake Harperand the daughter ofJeromeandKeisha Burnett. She is portrayed byTinashe Kachingwein the series. She made her first appearance in "The Mooch At The Boo", when she moved in with her father nearCharlie’sMalibu Beach house. Jake developed an instant crush on her. After Charlie took him over to her house, they went out for a walk, and developed a liking for each other, hence coming in a relationship. Celeste later made a cameo in "Whipped Unto The Third Generation", where she appeared to be controlling Jake behavior and choices. Jake gaveAlanandCharlieinstructions as to what Celeste would prefer for dinner, and what they require to do to make her happy.

characters.name: Charity
characters.description: Charity KirschenbaumPortrayed byLaura McLauchlinFirst seen"Kinda Like Necrophilia"Last seen"Kinda Like Necrophilia"Episode count1Full nameCharity KirschenbaumOriginUSASeason(s)S5Charity KirschenbaumwasAlan'sjunior high school girlfriend. She was going to be his prom date, but left him the night before for unspecified reasons. Twenty years later, it’s revealed that she dumped Alan forCharlieat the time because he was better-looking. Alan was furious with Charlie and retaliated by stealing Charlie's latest fling,Gabrielle. However, Alan couldn’t quite get even, because Charlie wanted to ditch Gabrielle anyway. Charlie got the last laugh when he slept with Charity again at the end of the episode. In German, “Kirschenbaum” means “cherry tree”. This would make Charity, Charity Cherry Tree.

characters.name: Chelsea Melini
characters.description: Chelsea MeliniBirthdate1976Portrayed byJennifer Bini TaylorFirst seen"Pinocchio's Mouth"Last seen"Of Course He's Dead"Episode count32Full nameChelsea MeliniOriginChampaign, Illinois (USA)ProfessionLandlordFamily membersMartha(Mother)Tom(Father)Alex(Ex-Husband)Unnamed BrotherUnnamed NieceCharlie Harper(Ex-Fiancee)Season(s)S1-S6-S7-S9-S12Chelsea Christine Meliniis the ex-fiancé of Charlie Harper and one of the few women he has actually loved. She debuts inSeason 6. Her relationship with Charlie is the main story-arc of the season's second half and most ofSeason 7. Chelsea is a gorgeous woman, with dark-brunette hair that is neck-length, brown eyes, pale skin, has natural 42E (95E) breasts and wears business casuals clothes. Chelsea's background is very conservative. Her motherMarthais a white supremacist and a homophobe. Her dadTom, who is a Navy veteran, seems to be the same but it is later revealed inSeason 7that he has been in love with a man, his old Navy buddyEdward Boyton, for many years. One of her cousins is a prostitute. She is a rich woman, owning several properties in affluent areas. Chelsea unlike Charlie is much more kind-hearted and loyal. She forgives Charlie multiple times despite him cheating on her and is friendly towards Alan whom Charlie often ridicules, even looking out for him. She also has a good relationship withBerta,Jakeand Evelyn unlike Charlie. She kept a good relationship with her ex mother-in-law even after divorcingAlex. Charlie comments that whenever she laughs she makes a snorting sound which he likes. She detests Charlie's lazy lifestyle especially with her as all he does is eat, have sex or watch sports when she comes over. She also has him get rid of the camcorder he uses to record naked women who he has sex with them and stop smoking after sex. Unlike her parents, she is liberal-minded and far more sensitive to others.

characters.name: Chelsea Melini
characters.description: Chelsea MeliniBirthdate1976Portrayed byJennifer Bini TaylorFirst seen"Pinocchio's Mouth"Last seen"Of Course He's Dead"Episode count32Full nameChelsea MeliniOriginChampaign, Illinois (USA)ProfessionLandlordFamily membersMartha(Mother)Tom(Father)Alex(Ex-Husband)Unnamed BrotherUnnamed NieceCharlie Harper(Ex-Fiancee)Season(s)S1-S6-S7-S9-S12Chelsea Christine Meliniis the ex-fiancé of Charlie Harper and one of the few women he has actually loved. She debuts inSeason 6. Her relationship with Charlie is the main story-arc of the season's second half and most ofSeason 7. Chelsea is a gorgeous woman, with dark-brunette hair that is neck-length, brown eyes, pale skin, has natural 42E (95E) breasts and wears business casuals clothes. Chelsea's background is very conservative. Her motherMarthais a white supremacist and a homophobe. Her dadTom, who is a Navy veteran, seems to be the same but it is later revealed inSeason 7that he has been in love with a man, his old Navy buddyEdward Boyton, for many years. One of her cousins is a prostitute. She is a rich woman, owning several properties in affluent areas. Chelsea unlike Charlie is much more kind-hearted and loyal. She forgives Charlie multiple times despite him cheating on her and is friendly towards Alan whom Charlie often ridicules, even looking out for him. She also has a good relationship withBerta,Jakeand Evelyn unlike Charlie. She kept a good relationship with her ex mother-in-law even after divorcingAlex. Charlie comments that whenever she laughs she makes a snorting sound which he likes. She detests Charlie's lazy lifestyle especially with her as all he does is eat, have sex or watch sports when she comes over. She also has him get rid of the camcorder he uses to record naked women who he has sex with them and stop smoking after sex. Unlike her parents, she is liberal-minded and far more sensitive to others.

characters.name: Cheryl Ann
characters.description: Cheryl AnnPortrayed byLisa ArningFirst seen"Camel Filters And Pheromones"Last seen"Camel Filters And Pheromones"Episode count1Full nameCheryl AnnOriginUSASeason(s)S1Cheryl Annis the eldest daughter ofBerta, the niece of Daisy, the mother ofPrudenceand the sister (possibly half sister) ofNaomi. She's mentioned earlier in the episode by Berta, saying how she shouldn't trust "the judgement of a woman who's off selling boot-leg Metallica T-shirts at a Monster Truck rally". She appeared in one of the final scenes of "Camel Filters And Pheromones" inCharlie's housewhen she went to look for her daughter Prudence to prevent her from marryingFreddie. She calls Freddie a "Little Snot-Bubble" and told her daughter, "Give me a break Prudence, you're sixteen years old and your hormones are doing the thinking for you". By the time she noticed Charlie and wanted to give him her number, Berta grabbed her and Prudence and took them.

characters.name: Chloe
characters.description: ChloePortrayed byRachel CannonFirst seenAnteaters. They're Just Crazy-Lookin'Last seenGumby with a PokeyEpisode count2Full nameChloeOriginUSASeason(s)S4,S7ChloewasCharlie's girlfriend in "Anteaters. They're Just Crazy-Lookin'". She was played byRachel Cannon. Chloe appeared in "Anteaters. They're Just Crazy-Lookin’” as a young woman who datedCharlie. They met at an animal shelter. She seemed rather clingy, to Charlie’s annoyance. When the outside deck needs repair,Alanhires the handsome handymanFernando(Enrique Iglesias). Initially, Charlie wants to get rid of her and claims to be sick to avoid her. But when she stops by to bring Charlie soup to make him feel better, she meets Fernando who makes a good first impression. Charlie notices and tries to win her back out of jealousy. He eventually goes to Chloe’s apartment when he bleached his teeth, has a spray tan and wears youthful clothing (in order to appear young and attractive like Fernando) to bring back the soup thermos she left him. However, it becomes clear that Fernando is with Chloe, and they were about to have sex. Unexpectedly, Charlie isn’t mad at Fernando, remarking it’s just how life goes. He gets the upper hand though when he makes Fernando clear he’s more financially capable than him (Charlie can buy Chloe expensive jewellery) and fires him on the spot. In “Gumby with a Pokey” she appears in Charlie's hallucination.

characters.name: Cindy
characters.description: CindyPortrayed byKristin DattiloFirst seen"If They Do Go Either Way, They're Usually Fake"Episode count1Full nameCindyOriginUSASeason(s)S1Cindyis a minor one-off character ofTwo and a Half Men. She is significantly known for being one of the women thatCharlieis not able to sleep with. She was the first 'crush' ofJakeand a brief friend ofJudith's, to whom she taught surfing. She is portrayed byKristin Dattilo. In "If They Do Go Either Way, They're Usually Fake", after Jake sees Cindy's butterfly tattooed butt, he develops an interest in women's body parts, and later draw her butt as an 'something interesting around the house' for his class work. Due to this, Judith makes a point of visiting and telling Charlie off and to 'clean his act' up when Jake is present in the Malibu house. At a later meeting with him, Cindy was also present. Not knowing that Cindy is the same woman that Jake drew a drawing of, both Cindy and Judith become instant friends due to their shared problems with their fathers, and Cindy teaches Judith to surf. They later go to the movies, and take with them. Due to their sudden association with each other,Alanthinks that both are gay, and have become lovers.

characters.name: Colleen
characters.description: ColleenPortrayed byNatalie ZeaFirst seen"We Called It Mr. Pinky"Last seen"We Called It Mr. Pinky"Episode count1Full nameColleenOriginUSASeason(s)S3Colleen(played byNatalie Zea) appears in the episode "We Called It Mr. Pinky". After a night of sex with Charlie, she says that she is in love with him, Charlie then merely says "Thank you." This lackadaisical attitude of Charlie annoys Colleen. Later in the episode they make up, though Charlie sees his mother's face on her while they are having sex causing him to scream in terror and scare her away.

characters.name: Courtney Leopold
characters.description: Sylvia FishmanGenderFemalePortrayed byJenny McCarthyFirst seenShoes, Hats, Pickle Jar LidsLast seenNine Magic FingersAppeared inTight’s GoodLook at Me, Mommy, I'm PrettyFish in a DrawerOw, Ow, Don't StopDead from the Waist DownChocolate Diddlers or My Puppy's DeadNice to Meet You, Walden SchmidtNine Magic FingersEpisode count8Full nameSylvia FishmanFamily membersJames(Possible Brother)Nathan Krunk(Alleged Father)Charlie Harper(Ex-Fiancé)Season(s)S5-S8-S9Sylvia Fishman, also referred to asCourtney Leopold, is aminorrecurring character ofTwo and a Half MenfromSeason 5,8and9. She was a former professionalCon-Artist, and laterCharlie's temporary girlfriend.  Sylvia made her first appearance inShoes, Hats, Pickle Jar LidsasTeddy’sdaughter Courtney. Charlie immediately falls for her stunning beauty, but Teddy immediately asks Charlie to stay away from her. Though Charlie tries to remain faithful to Teddy, he ends up having sex with her, as she tricks him into doing so, so that she can blackmail him into buying a Ferrari. At all stages,Alantries to stop Charlie from getting close to her, warning that she's a sociopath, but he doesn’t listen.

characters.name: Cynthia Sullivan
characters.description: Cynthia SullivanPortrayed byChristina MooreFirst seen"The Soil is Moist"Last seen"The Soil is Moist"Episode count1Full nameCynthia SullivanOriginUSAFamily membersBill Sullivan(Ex-Husband)Season(s)S5Cynthia Sullivanis an old friend ofJudithwho datedAlanwhen she got divorced from her husband, Bill. She appeared in the episode "The Soil is Moist". WhenCharlie, Alan andJakereturned from the cinema and went for coffee, she was found there. She said that she was just divorced and, therefore, Alan ​​asked her out on a date. But first, he wanted to ask Judith if it was okay (because she and Cynthia were old friends). Judith said yes, but she also said that Cynthia would say no to him. But she said yes and they finally had sex after the date. After that, Cynthia said to Alan, that Judith told to her thatHerbwas the better lover (which infuriated Alan). Finally they broke up because he was asking why Herb was so good a lover and Cynthia couldn't take it anymore and asked him to leave. Cynthia is a gorgrous woman, she has long blonde, blue eyes, prominent cheekbones, has fair skin, wears casual clothing, and is of medium height,

characters.name: Daisy Ray
characters.description: Daisy RayPortrayed byCamryn ManheimFirst seen"A Kosher Slaughterhouse Out in Fontana"Last seen"A Kosher Slaughterhouse Out in Fontana"Episode count1Full nameDaisy RayOriginUSAFamily membersChick (Half-brother)Berta(Half-sister)Naomi(Niece)Cheryl Ann(Niece)Prudence(Great niece)Brittany Pam(Great niece)Larry (Ex-Husband)unnamed motherSeason(s)S2Daisyis Berta's younger sister. She is played byCamryn Manheim. WhenCharlieandAlanhad to organize a party forEvelyn, Berta suggested they call her sister, Daisy, who is party decorator. But the problem was that she andBertaspent all their time fighting and did not focus on the party. Charlie tried everything for them to make peace and, finally, got her act right in front of everyone, taking the limelight from Evelyn who was disregarded in the party. Even though their family was poor, Daisy was the favorite child. Berta had to let go many of her useful things for Daisy to have some silly, useless things.
